pipeline_order_note: This is the correct processing sequence. Lane folder numbers are legacy from v1. Follow pipeline_order for execution.

lanes.name: Drop Intake
lanes.purpose: Receive raw article. Validate readable. Emit manifest.

lanes.name: Lossless Extraction
lanes.purpose: Convert source to canonical text. No interpretation. Preserve all structure.

lanes.name: Vectorize
lanes.purpose: Embed raw document and every section FIRST. Machine must know what the thing IS in vector space before categorization.

lanes.name: Section Map
lanes.purpose: Detect headings, hierarchy, equation boundaries, citation boundaries. Assign stable section_id values and UUIDs. Emit section_map.json and per-section text packets.
lanes.notes: Narrow scope: section structure only. Vector/address/hash owned by 04_TAGS. PDS four-score/eight-gaps are downstream assembly, not this lane.

lanes.name: YAML + Filing
lanes.purpose: Derive YAML frontmatter and filing metadata FROM categorization output.
lanes.notes: Address = identity. Grade = audit metadata. Grade NOT in filename.

lanes.name: Tags
lanes.purpose: Attach semantic tags derived from vector + domain badges. Chi variables, law references, workflow tags.

lanes.name: Math Translation
lanes.purpose: Parse equations, translate to plain English, preserve raw math. REVISITABLE.
lanes.notes: App-shaped. Loopback to 14 when translation breaks meaning.

lanes.name: Claims
lanes.purpose: Extract claims per section. Three-layer arch: surface/buried/operational. PDS does initial extraction; this lane refines.

lanes.name: Contradictions
lanes.purpose: Run NLI pass on claims. Score entailment/neutral/contradiction. Must run BEFORE rigor.

lanes.name: Rigor
lanes.purpose: 7Q forward+reverse, fact verification, contradiction pressure. Readiness score + kill conditions.

lanes.name: Graph Links
lanes.purpose: Generate edges from claims, vectors, variables, tags.

lanes.name: HTML Render
lanes.purpose: Combine upstream outputs into article-ready HTML. Apply template.

lanes.name: Exports
lanes.purpose: Generate vault notes, graph payloads, database sync JSON.

lanes.name: Section Packets
lanes.purpose: Bundle all per-section outputs into one packet per section_id.

lanes.name: Final Page Assembly
lanes.purpose: Combine section packets + HTML render + metadata into publish-ready page.

lanes.name: Publish Ready
lanes.purpose: Final output. Only files that pass all gates.

lanes.name: Layer Ledger
lanes.purpose: Record which lanes each section has passed. Orchestration. Snapshots append never overwrite.

lanes.name: Loopback Review
lanes.purpose: Receive broken outputs. Route back upstream.
